charts.control-plane: the janitor's freeze and sweep authority
charts.storage: the S3 revision-bundle store the runner loads from

validateRevisionBundle.translates: a candidate revision into a frozen bundle only if the runner would accept it — entrypoint, tools, model, and cron validated in lockstep with the runner's load contract

nonTransition.buildJanitorApp: approval routes never bypass the shared serializer — single-source consumption within the janitor app
nonTransition.sweepOnce: bounded-retry sweep — a stuck session is reaped after maxRetries; liveness within the control plane
